texto: I have learned one lesson in all this and I will share it knowing it will do no one any good. The lesson is this: "There are none more complicit in one's undoing than one's own heart".
explicacao: Citação de James Pratt sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “I have learned one lesson in all this and I will share it knowing it will do no one any good. The…” articula amor, gothic, horror em registro de amor, com relevância para contextos como horror e vampires.

frase_original: I have learned one lesson in all this and I will share it knowing it will do no one any good. The lesson is this: "There are none more complicit in one's undoing than one's own heart".

texto: One of the things that helps use cope with loss is the fact that while memories may remian, the emotions associated with them will fade like old photographs. At the same time, there is a masochistic desire to retain those feelings spurred on by the dread of losing the power they hold. Sometimes I can't think of anything more awful than simply being human.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a James Pratt: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “One of the things that helps use cope with loss is the fact that while memories may remian, the e…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, loss, memories pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de luto e memories.

frase_original: One of the things that helps use cope with loss is the fact that while memories may remian, the emotions associated with them will fade like old photographs. At the same time, there is a masochistic desire to retain those feelings spurred on by the dread of losing the power they hold. Sometimes I can't think of anything more awful than simply being human.
